biography: Eero is a familiar face around the Hector Trophée, known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game.

While details about Eero's home club remain private, his dedication to golf is clear. Though he has participated in the Hector Trophée on one occasion in the past, he has not yet lifted the coveted trophy, nor has he secured the individual Victor Trophy. Eero is known to carefully analyze the course before each round, often spending hours studying the greens.

Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, Eero's presence may be missed by fellow competitors and fans alike. However, as we all know, anything can happen, and there is always a chance of a comeback.
